mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalResources, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingResources, SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS publishedResources, COALESCE(SUM(r.download_count), 0) AS totalDownloads, COALESCE(SUM(r.view_count), 0) AS totalViews, COALESCE(SUM(collect_cnt.cnt), 0) AS totalCollects, SUM(CASE WHEN r.upload_time >= #{since} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS newResourcesInPeriod FROM xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT c.resource_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM collection c WHERE c.resource_type = 'primary_chinese' GROUP BY c.resource_id ) collect_cnt ON collect_cnt.resource_id = r.id WHERE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r WHERE r.upload_time < #{before} AND

SELECT DATE(r.upload_time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r WHERE r.upload_time >= #{since} AND
GROUP BY DATE(r.upload_time) ORDER BY day

SELECT DATE(a.create_time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_resource_action a INNER JOIN xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r ON r.id = a.resource_id AND a.resource_type = 'primary_chinese' WHERE a.action_type = 'view' AND a.create_time >= #{since} AND
GROUP BY DATE(a.create_time) ORDER BY day

SELECT DATE(a.create_time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_resource_action a INNER JOIN xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r ON r.id = a.resource_id AND a.resource_type = 'primary_chinese' WHERE a.action_type = 'download' AND a.create_time >= #{since} AND
GROUP BY DATE(a.create_time) ORDER BY day

SELECT DATE(c.create_time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM collection c INNER JOIN xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r ON r.id = c.resource_id AND c.resource_type = 'primary_chinese' WHERE c.create_time >= #{since} AND
GROUP BY DATE(c.create_time) ORDER BY day

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN l.action = 'approve' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS approved, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN l.action = 'reject' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rejected FROM resource_audit_log l INNER JOIN xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r ON r.id = l.resource_id WHERE l.created_at >= #{since} AND

SELECT r.stage AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r WHERE
GROUP BY r.stage ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT r.subject AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r WHERE
GROUP BY r.subject ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.stage, r.subject, COALESCE(r.download_count, 0) AS downloadCount, COALESCE(r.view_count, 0) AS viewCount, COALESCE(collect_cnt.cnt, 0) AS collectCount FROM xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT c.resource_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM collection c WHERE c.resource_type = 'primary_chinese' GROUP BY c.resource_id ) collect_cnt ON collect_cnt.resource_id = r.id WHERE
ORDER BY r.download_count DESC, r.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.stage, r.subject, COALESCE(r.download_count, 0) AS downloadCount, COALESCE(r.view_count, 0) AS viewCount, COALESCE(collect_cnt.cnt, 0) AS collectCount FROM xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT c.resource_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM collection c WHERE c.resource_type = 'primary_chinese' GROUP BY c.resource_id ) collect_cnt ON collect_cnt.resource_id = r.id WHERE
ORDER BY r.view_count DESC, r.download_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.stage, r.subject, COALESCE(r.download_count, 0) AS downloadCount, COALESCE(r.view_count, 0) AS viewCount, COALESCE(collect_cnt.cnt, 0) AS collectCount FROM xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r INNER JOIN ( SELECT c.resource_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM collection c WHERE c.resource_type = 'primary_chinese' GROUP BY c.resource_id ) collect_cnt ON collect_cnt.resource_id = r.id WHERE
ORDER BY collect_cnt.cnt DESC, r.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.uploader_id AS uploaderId, COUNT(*) AS uploadCount FROM xinketang.oss_primary_chinese_resource r WHERE r.upload_time >= #{since} AND
GROUP BY r.uploader_id ORDER BY uploadCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
